meta_title: Hytale F2P - Free Multiplayer Servers & Launcher | SanHost
meta_description: Play Hytale for free with community servers. Download the F2P launcher, host your own server, or join existing ones. Open-source project by SanHost.
og_title: Hytale F2P - Free Multiplayer Servers & Launcher

twitter_title: Hytale F2P - Free Multiplayer Servers & Launcher

hero_description: Play Hytale for free with community servers. Download the launcher, host your own server for free, or browse the server list to find a game.
card_download_text: The Hytale F2P Launcher lets you play Hytale multiplayer for free. Cross-platform support for Windows, macOS, and Linux with automatic updates.
card_hosting_text: Get your own free Hytale server with 3 GB RAM, DualAuth support, and full control panel. No credit card needed — instant provisioning.
card_serverlist_text: Browse and discover Hytale F2P community servers. Find active games, vote for your favorites, and connect with other players.
card_source_text: Hytale F2P is fully open-source. View the code, contribute, report bugs, or fork the project. Built with Electron and Node.js.
card_dualauth_text: Unique dual authentication system allows both official Hytale players and F2P users to play on the same servers seamlessly.
card_community_text: Join the SanHost community chat, Telegram group, or follow the news channel for updates, support, and discussions about Hytale F2P.
about_p1: Hytale F2P is an open-source project that enables free multiplayer access to Hytale, the highly anticipated sandbox game. Our community-driven platform provides everything you need to play Hytale with friends without requiring an official account.
about_item_launcher: F2P Launcher — A cross-platform launcher (Windows, macOS, Linux) that patches the Hytale client for free-to-play access with automatic updates
about_item_dualauth: DualAuth Agent — A server-side authentication system that allows both official and F2P players on the same server
about_item_hosting: Free Server Hosting — Instant server provisioning with 3 GB RAM, DualAuth pre-configured, and a full management panel
about_item_serverlist: Server List — A community-maintained directory of active Hytale F2P servers at santale.top
about_p3: Whether you want to host your own Hytale server, join existing community servers, or contribute to the project's development, SanHost is the home for Hytale free-to-play multiplayer.
community_description: Connect with other Hytale F2P players, get help, and stay updated.
